seo.title: Aei Idupattum Song Lyrics Aanai
seo.description: Full Aei Idupattum Song songs lyrics, Aanai Songs Lyrics. sharable lyrics snippets, Music: D Imman, Singer(s): D Imman, Srilekha Parthasarathy.
seo.keywords: Aanai, D Imman, D Imman, Srilekha Parthasarathy, Aei Idupattum Song full lyrics, Aanai songs lyrics, Aei Idupattum Song lyrics snippets, Aei Idupattum Song WhatsApp status lyrics snippets, share Aei Idupattum Song lyrics snippets with friends, Tamil lyrics, Tamil songs

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

Who are the singers of the song Aei Idupattum?

The song is sung by D Imman and Srilekha Parthasarathy.

Which movie features the song Aei Idupattum?

The song is from the Tamil movie Aanai, released in 2005.

Who are the lead actors in the movie Aanai?

The lead roles in the movie were played by Arjun Sarja and Namitha.

What is the mood of the song Aei Idupattum?

The song has an energetic and peppy mood, making it suitable for celebrations and parties.

Who composed the music for the movie Aanai?

The music for the movie was composed by D Imman.
enrichedMetadata.summary: The song Aei Idupattum from the 2005 Tamil movie Aanai, starring Arjun Sarja and Namitha, is a lively and energetic track. Composed by D Imman and sung by D Imman and Srilekha Parthasarathy, the song features vibrant beats and engaging lyrics. It is a dance number that adds a celebratory vibe to the movie's narrative. The song's dynamic rhythm and catchy tune make it a popular choice for festive occasions and parties.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Aei Idupattum, a vibrant track from the movie Aanai, showcases the energetic beats of D Imman's music composition. Sung by D Imman and Srilekha Parthasarathy, this song captures a lively and celebratory mood. Its dynamic rhythm and engaging lyrics make it a favorite for festive occasions and dance floors.
stanzaMeanings: Aei Idupattum Song Lyrics Aanai
Hey, the beautiful house is near your place, made of soft cotton, come close to my home.
The green hills are calling, when they come near, they bring the village with them.
This big cotton ball has never been seen before. Until now, it has never been seen on a big night.
Hey, the beautiful house.
Your beauty is like the first light, I will come and dance in the house that has been built with love.
Oh, my dear, your heart is like a treasure, it can capture the golden girl, your heritage is like the forest of love.
Hey, until the first light, everything is just a little bit of chaos, the world is not settled yet.
From there to here, everything is given, don't let it go to waste.
If you say a little, it will be like a golden bracelet, if you do a little wrong, it won't be a beautiful thing.
This big cotton ball has never been seen before. Until now, it has never been seen on a big night.
Hey, the beautiful house is near your place, made of soft cotton, come close to my home.
Hey, we will take care of each other, now we will start the journey, let’s enjoy this moment together.
It's alright, it's okay, show a little here and there. Gather all the beauty and keep it close.
In your eyes, you have given me all the love. Until the end, it has blossomed beautifully.
Hey, I looked at your entire body, your body is like a mirror reflecting my heart.
The sculptor smiled and started to play, the ship danced and went deep into the sea.
This big cotton ball has never been seen before. Until now, it has never been seen on a big night.
Hey, the beautiful house, the beautiful house, hey, the beautiful house is near your place, made of soft cotton, come close to my home.
The green hills are calling, when they come near, they bring the village with them.
This big cotton ball has never been seen before. Until now, it has never been seen on a big night.
